subject: Dwebble, a small orange crab-like creature sheltering behind a large grey rock it has claimed as a shell, on a sandy and rocky ground
description: Dwebble sits in the lower-center of the frame, its compact orange crab body partly visible peeking out from under a large rough grey boulder that it carries on its back like a shell. Two prominent claws are extended forward and visible. The ground is sandy and pebbly. The background is warm and somewhat hazy, with muted earth tones and indistinct sandy terrain. The composition is a low mid-shot placing the small creature close to the viewer. The mood is quietly alert rather than aggressive — this creature is hunkered near its shelter.
foreground: Dwebble peeking from beneath its carried boulder, claws extended
background: sandy pebbly ground, warm hazy backdrop
